LanguageData.StkVacDoorsLabel: Free Integrated VacBarrier Doors after the "Orbital Tech" Research
LanguageData.StkVacDoorsDesc: If enabled, after researching the orbital tech, powered doors will act as VacBarriers.
LanguageData.StkFueledVacDoorsLabel: (Needs Restart) Enable Vacuum Proofing upgrade to any powered airtight door.
LanguageData.StkFueledVacDoorsDesc: When enabled you can upgrade doors with Gravlite panels to create Integrated VacBarrier. Make sure to use airtight materials for the doors!
LanguageData.StkVisualiseVacDoorsLabel: (Beta) Enable graphics for any active VacDoor.
LanguageData.StkVisualiseVacDoorsDesc: When enabled your doors will glow, when they activily protecting you from vacuum and temperature change. if you're having problems with FPS or TPS, please disable it to completely remove any calculations.
